steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Genetic research is determining the wild ancestor of summer squash. The key phrase—”genetic research only recently ______ its ancestor to be the wild Johnny gourd”—signals an act of discovery or identification.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Revealed” is the precise word for discovery—the phrase “research revealed X to be Y” idiomatically means identifying what something is.

The others don't apply: “petitioned” and “encouraged” are unrelated to discovering ancestors, while “expanded” describes physical growth, not discovery.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
